seoTitle: Massey Bay vs Maya — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Massey Bay and Maya. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Massey Bay vs Maya: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Massey Bay and Maya.
heading: Massey Bay vs Maya — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Massey Bay, Western Australia and Maya, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Massey Bay has a lower overall climate risk score (30/100) compared to Maya (31/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Massey Bay or Maya safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Massey Bay has a flood risk score of 58/100, while Maya scores 32/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Massey Bay scores 33/100 for bushfire risk. Maya scores 30/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Massey Bay or Maya?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Massey Bay has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.2% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
